constraints.name: nonNegativeQty
constraints.message: Quantity on hand cannot be negative

constraints.name: warnZeroStock
constraints.messageTemplate: Stock for item '{inventoryItemId}' at location '{storageLocationId}' is zero

constraints.name: warnLowScore
constraints.messageTemplate: Low vendor rating ({score}/5) for category '{category}' — consider reviewing supplier

constraints.name: warnOverBudget
constraints.messageTemplate: Procurement budget '{name}' is over budget (spent {spent}, limit {limit})

constraints.name: validThreshold
constraints.message: Threshold percentage must be between 0 and 150

constraints.name: warnInactive
constraints.messageTemplate: Audit schedule '{name}' is inactive — cycle counts will not run automatically

value.value: Cannot update a deactivated storage location

constraints.name: blockNegativeResult
constraints.messageTemplate: Adjustment would result in negative stock ({result})

constraints.name: warnLargeVariance
constraints.messageTemplate: Recount shows variance of more than 20% for item '{inventoryItemId}'

value.value: Can only escalate active or acknowledged alerts
Only draft forecasts can be published
Only published forecasts can be approved
Procurement budget management is not enabled
Period end must be after period start

constraints.name: blockReduceBelowSpent
constraints.messageTemplate: Cannot reduce budget below already-spent amount ({spent})

value.value: Cannot record spend against a closed budget
Cannot update a deactivated audit schedule
Cannot record a run for an inactive schedule

policies.name: InventoryManagersCanManageStorage
policies.message: Inventory managers can manage storage locations

policies.name: SystemCanCreateForecasts
policies.message: Managers can create and update forecasts

policies.name: InventoryManagersCanManageReorders
policies.message: Inventory managers can manage reorder suggestions

policies.name: InventoryManagersCanManageTransferItems
policies.message: Inventory managers can manage transfer line items
